problem: Почему отключение чата для игрока не работает?
solution: Возможный конфликт с другими плагинами или неправильная настройка. Предложено приложить список установленных плагинов (pluginlist) для проверки.
title: Чат текстовый

problem: How to configure a minigame at the end of a map in Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) so that players receive credits when they find a box after completing the map.
solution: Use the 'Shop Ball' plugin version 1.1 available at https://hlmod.net/resources/shop-ball.344/, which provides rewards in the form of credits upon map completion.
title: Выдача кредитов за прохождение карты

problem: How to prevent modified textures, models, sounds, etc., from being used on a Counter-Strike: Source server, specifically regarding VAC not detecting custom (VH) textures that are added as an extension to the game.
solution: Use the `sv_pure` command. This command enforces pure server settings, preventing clients from using modified or unauthorized files such as custom textures and models, thereby helping VAC detect and ban cheaters effectively.
title: Блокировка пользовательского контента

problem: The GameDescOveride method for overriding the game description in Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) is not working, and the user is seeking alternative solutions.
solution: Use the sw_gamedesc_override.smx plugin from AlliedModders. Compile it with SourceMod version 1.10.0-git6454, install the plugin, and add the command `sw_gamedesc_override "Название_для_отображения"` to server.cfg to set the desired display name.
title: Изменение названия игры CS:S OB

problem: Compilation error in the plugin file 'kdlp-gameevents.sp' due to an unclosed string on line 55 (missing closing ')').
solution: Ensure that the string is properly closed with a ')' at the end of line 55, as indicated by the response from RusJJ.
title: Переписка плагина

problem: When a new player joins the game, they are initially given 1000 points instead of 0 points in the 'advanced rating' statistics type within a specific plugin. The user needs to know where this parameter is defined and how to change it to give new players 0 points.
solution: The solution involves locating the parameter that sets the initial score for new players within the plugin's configuration or source code. This typically requires editing the relevant settings file (e.g., a .cfg or .lua file) or modifying the initialization logic in the plugin's script where player scores are assigned upon joining. The exact steps would depend on the plugin's structure, but generally involve finding the line that assigns 1000 points and changing it to assign 0 points.
title: Нужно изменить в плагине Level ranks одну штуку. Не пойму, как.

problem: The user is trying to create a Counter-Strike: Source server using LinuxGSM on a Linux system but encounters an error at the step where `wget` attempts to download the `linuxgsm.sh` script, resulting in the message '[FAIL] Curl is not installed'.
solution: Install the `curl` package (or ensure that `wget` is properly configured to handle HTTPS) before running the LinuxGSM setup command. This can typically be done with a package manager like `apt-get install curl` on Debian-based systems or `yum install curl` on Red Hat-based systems.
title: Создание сервера на Linux Game Server Managers

problem: How to change the color of the spiderweb (pautinki) in Counter-Strike: Source using SourceMod.
solution: Edit the configuration parameters sm_hgr_***_blue, sm_hgr_***_red, and sm_hgr_***_green in the SourceMod config file to adjust the desired colors.
title: Как изменить цвет паутинки ?

problem: Прозрачная дымовая граната (проблема с прозрачным смоком) на всех картах, при которой через дым видна часть карты, а сам дым выглядит обычным.
solution: Отключить плагин 048 "Grenade Smoke Color" (1.1) by HSFighter или другие возможно конфликтующие модификации смока, также проверить наличие и активность всех связанных с дымом модулей и плагинов.
title: Прозрачная дымовая граната [закрыто]

problem: Whether it is necessary to restart the Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) server daily and what benefits this provides.
solution: Yes, it is advisable to perform a daily server restart. This clears system memory that accumulates garbage during operation, helping maintain server stability and performance.
title: Стоит ли перезагружать сервер 1 раз в день?

problem: The user wants to stop the Shavit (bhop) timer when a player uses a spider (pautinka).
solution: Use the provided resource from HLMod: https://hlmod.net/resources/ostanovka-tajmera-shavit-timer.283/
title: Как остановить таймер для паутинки? (Shavit bhop timer)

problem: The user is looking for a web-based control panel to manage multiple CS:S servers (version 34) with features such as adding new users, restricting their rights (e.g., server restarts, retrieving demo files), and editing configuration files (cfg or txt). The current setup involves automatic demo logging per map and a Steam ID protection plugin that requires file edits when adding new admins to SourceBans.
solution: Several options were suggested: GamePanelX (English interface) at http://gamepanelx.com/, Tornado panel, OpenGamePanel at www.opengamepanel.org, and Pterodactyl as mentioned in a later post. Additionally, there are mentions of custom panels available for purchase via Skype or from specific hosting providers, though caution is advised regarding security and potential vulnerabilities.
title: Веб-панель управления серверами

problem: How to make alive players not hear dead players in the voice chat of Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S OrangeBox).
solution: Use the 'Voice Users' plugin by www.MyArena.ru. Set the mode to 0, which allows only live teammates to communicate with each other and prevents live players from hearing dead teammates.
title: Голосовой чат [ Живые и мертвые]

problem: The VIP_AutoBuy plugin (vip/VIP_AutoBuy_1.0.0.smx) is intermittently failing to load, producing an error during startup. The error log indicates that the plugin cannot create a new entity when no map is running, specifically triggered by calls within vip/VIP_Core.smx and related initialization functions.
solution: Ensure that the VIP_AutoBuy plugin is only loaded after a valid map has started. This can be achieved by checking for the presence of a running map before attempting to register features or initialize entities. Additionally, verify compatibility with the current Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) version and consider waiting for an updated version of the plugin from R1KO, as it is expected soon.
title: Ошибка с плагином Vip_autobuy

problem: Skin files with the .bz2 extension are not appearing in the server's skin list.
solution: The issue was resolved by removing the '.bz2' file extension from all skin files on the server.
title: Не появляются списке скинов скины с .bz2 Почему?

problem: The user has implemented an automatic weapon restriction (авто ограничение авп) on all maps in Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S). They now want to automatically allow the AWPer weapon only on AWPer-specific maps and restrict deags (and possibly other weapons) universally, without relying on admin intervention.
solution: Use the 'Weapon Restrict' plugin version 3.1.6 by komashchenko, which is described as user-friendly, easy to configure, and includes VIP immunity. This plugin will automatically handle the weapon restrictions as required.
title: Weapon Restrict

problem: The 'NoBlock' plugin intermittently fails to work correctly on the server, causing some players to be unable to move or perform actions. Additionally, other plugins like 'Admin Join Sound' stop functioning when the 'SM Ultra R52' module is enabled.
solution: Set the `sm_revival_noblock_time` configuration variable of the 'Revival' plugin to 0 and ensure compatibility or disable conflicting plugins (e.g., 'Admin Join Sound') when using the 'SM Ultra R52' module.
title: No Block

problem: The user is experiencing issues with music and sound files disappearing after converting them to bz2 format for faster downloads on a Counter-Strike: Source server. The problem arises when the original uncompressed files are deleted, causing the bz2-compressed files to fail in playing audio correctly.
solution: Keep both the original uncompressed files and their bz2 compressed counterparts on the server. Use the bz2 files for fast downloads via FastDL while retaining the original files to ensure proper playback of music and sound effects.
title: Вопрос по bz2

problem: Players are experiencing an issue where the MOTD (Message of the Day) opens a web browser instead of displaying text, making it impossible for them to take any action. This problem started after integrating a statistics website with Cloudflare.
solution: The solution involves investigating why the MOTD is triggering a browser link due to the integration with Cloudflare and finding an alternative method to display the MOTD without causing this side effect, possibly by adjusting the plugin settings or modifying how the MOTD content is generated.
title: в MOTD открывается проводник

problem: A lag issue occurs when a round starts on an AVP server, causing players to appear abruptly from behind corners and seemingly teleport across the map for about 4-8 frames. This problem is observed on multiple servers and seems related to anti-cheat or respawn mechanics.
solution: Disable the SMAC Anti-Wallhack module (or remove the entire SMAC package) as it exacerbates the effect, especially at higher ping levels. The issue was confirmed to be resolved after turning off this specific module.
title: Кто сталкивался с данным лагом? Как его устранить??

problem: The user is unable to find a version of SteamWorks compatible with SourceMod 1.9+ for Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) v34, as the required Steam library is not present in this version.
solution: There is no direct equivalent or alternative for SteamWorks in CS:S v34 because it fundamentally depends on a newer version of the Steam library that was never included. The user should consider creating a new topic to discuss an alternative plugin like VPN Block.
title: SteamWorks

problem: The custom knife skin for Counter-Strike: Source (CSS) is not displaying the hand texture correctly. After decompiling an existing skin with Crowbar, replacing the material files (.vtf and .vmt), and compiling the model using SDK versions 2 and 3, the resulting model lacks the hand texture while retaining other elements.
solution:
The issue stems from incorrect bone definitions for the knife's fingers. The user removed several `$hbox` entries related to finger geometry and incorrectly defined bones in the QC file. To resolve this, ensure that all necessary `$hbox` entries for each finger are retained and that the `$definebone` statements correctly reference the parent bones (`v_weapon.Bip01_L_Hand` and `v_weapon.Bip01_R_Hand`). Additionally, verify that the texture paths in the `.vmt` file point to valid `.vtf` files located in the correct directories (`models
ame	extures older`). Re-compiling with these corrections should restore the hand texture on the custom knife skin.
title: Помогите с самодельным скином ножа

problem: The Counter-Strike: Source server fails to launch properly and appears as 'Not responding'. The logs indicate that the Steam support library cannot be loaded, resulting in an error message: '[S_API FAIL] SteamAPI_Init() failed; SteamAPI_IsSteamRunning() failed.' Additionally, there are configuration file errors related to missing braces '{' in several config files.
solution: Reinstall the server and ensure all configuration files have properly closed braces. Specifically, correct the syntax errors in the three mentioned configuration files (e.g., cfg/sourcemod/army/army.cfg) by adding the missing opening or closing braces. This should resolve the Steam library loading issue and allow the server to start correctly.
title: Не запускается сервер

problem: VIP players are automatically receiving grenades on AWP maps despite attempts to disable them via the admin panel or map configuration.
solution: Use the Map Config plugin by _wS_ to unload the specific VIP grenades module for individual maps. Create a config file named after the map (e.g., awp.cfg) and include the command: `sm plugins unload "vip/<plugin_name>"` where `<plugin_name>` is the name of the grenades module located in the sourcemod/plugins/vip directory.
title: Випам выдаются гранаты на авп картах VIP by R1ko

problem: The Weapon Fight plugin plays the same duel music twice when a fight starts, causing overlapping tracks and confusion. The music continues even after the duel ends.
solution: Set the configuration parameter `sm_weaponfight_stopmusic` to `1` in the file `cfg/sourcemod/weaponfight.cfg`. This will stop the music when the fight is over, preventing overlap.
title: Weapon Fight 1.3.8.4

problem: The 'Ban disconnected players' plugin is incorrectly banning players with an invalid SteamID (STEAM_0:0:-99867014) instead of the correct one (STEAM_0:0:1148813502). As a result, banned players can reconnect without restriction. Additionally, the plugin does not list disconnected players for banning.
solution: Replace the 'Ban disconnected players' plugin with the 'Offline Ban list' plugin, which functions correctly and resolves the issue of incorrect SteamID handling and proper listing of disconnected players.
title: Не работает бан сбежавших

problem: The VIP_AutoBuy_1.0.0 plugin for the [VIP] Core module is not being unloaded correctly via Map Config on the awp_lego map in cstrike/addons/sourcemod/plugins/vip/, causing it to fail to unload and leading to issues on subsequent maps where auto-buy functionality should be present.
solution: Rename the plugin to VIP_Autobuy, adjust the configuration files as suggested (e.g., disable round-specific access via the VIP Features Manager), and wait for an official update from R1KO that addresses the unloading issue across all maps.

problem: How to remove wall defusing of the bomb in CSS v90?
solution: [CS:Source] - Defuse Fix

problem: There is a need for a plugin that allows server administrators to hear dead players and view the chat of the opposing team, while also preventing dead players from seeing anything beyond their own team's activities.

problem: There is a voice exploit affecting Windows servers, and the user seeks methods to analyze and block malicious voice packets using MikroTik firewall or by developing an extension similar to Processcmd for Windows servers.
solution: Develop a packet sniffer (similar to Wireshark) to identify coincidences in the packet stream and compile it as an extension. Alternatively, utilize existing tools like winsock_sniffer written in C to dump Winsock information and block malicious packets via MikroTik firewall.

problem: The user wants to modify the behavior of bots in Counter-Strike: Source so that they stop camping (remaining stationary) at certain points on the map.
solution: If auto-generation of the bot navigation grid for the map was used, it creates points where bots can camp. These points can be manually removed using `nav_edit 1`, or alternatively, the command `nav_dont_hide` can be used to prevent bots from hiding at those points.
title: Поведение ботов.

problem: How to create custom weapon skins for a CS:S server and how to implement them.
solution: The solution involves using SourceMod or other server-side tools to modify the game's model files, creating new skin textures, and configuring the server settings to apply these custom skins to the weapons in the game.

problem: Search for character models, weapons, etc. for a CS:S server of any version.
solution: The post seeks information or resources regarding the server skin 'Deagle | Пламя' (Deagle | Flame) specifically, as part of a broader request to find models for a Counter-Strike: Source server.
title: Поиск моделей на сервер CS:S - все версии.

problem: Как разукрасить текст в файлах переводов (translations файлы) для Counter-Strike: Source, чтобы отображались цвета в игре.
solution: Использовать специальные коды цвета вида \x07HEX_COLOR перед текстом в файлах переводов. Пример: \x07FFFFFF[SMAC Ultr@] для красного фона и синего текста. Также рекомендуется использовать инклюд morecolors для более удобной работы с цветами.
title: [Решено]Цветной текст в translations файлах [CS:S OB]

problem: The plugin VIP_Grenades_CSS_1.0.0 fails to install on a Linux server running Counter-Strike: Source with SourceMod, producing the error: 'Errors: vip/VIP_Grenades_CSS_1.0.0.smx ([VIP] Grenades (CS:S)): Native "VIP_HookClientSpawn" was not found'. The native function VIP_HookClientSpawn required by the plugin is missing.
solution: Install or ensure the presence of the [VIP] Client Spawn Hook Fix 1.0.1 module, which provides the missing native 'VIP_HookClientSpawn' for the VIP_Grenades_CSS_1.0.0 plugin to function correctly.

problem: The player experiences a drop to the ground while surfing on a public server, making surfing nearly impossible. The issue seems related to incorrect map configuration or server settings.

If there is no such feature, edit the .sp file (if present). For manual translation, place English translations in the root language directory and Russian translations in the 'ru' subdirectory.

problem: The server fails to start due to the inability to load the `steamclient.so` shared object file, resulting in a SteamAPI_Init failure and an assertion error. The error message indicates that the system cannot find or open the required `steamclient.so` located at `/null/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so`.
solution: Manually specify the correct path to the `steamclient.so` file by setting the `STEAM_APPID` environment variable and ensuring the Steam client SDK is properly installed. For example, add the following line before launching the server: `export STEAM_APPID=730 && /srv/gameap/steamcmd/linux32/srcds_run -game cstrike +maxplayers 16 +map de_dust2`. This directs the server to use the correct Steam client SDK located at `/srv/gameap/steamcmd/linux32/steamclient.so`.
title: Ошибка при запуске сервера

problem: Extracting server name, map, and duration information from demo files in Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) using SourceMod or similar tools.
solution: Utilize existing parsers such as ValveSoftware/csgo-demoinfo for C++ or VitalyArt/hltv-demo-parser for PHP to read binary data according to the demo file format documentation provided by Valve. This allows extraction of server details directly from the demo files.

problem: The admin configuration specified in admins_simple.ini is not being recognized by SourceMod on the Counter-Strike: Source server. When attempting to connect with the configured nickname, the server responds with 'Disconnect: Your name is reserved by SourceMod; set your password to use it.', indicating that a password must be set for the nickname, but all attempts to set the password via various `setinfo` commands and file modifications have failed.
solution: The issue was resolved by changing the PassInfoVar in core.cfg from '_password' to '_pw'. After updating this variable to match the admin configuration in admins_simple.ini, the server correctly recognized the nickname and allowed access when the appropriate password command (`setinfo "_pw" pro363955`) was executed.

problem: Compatibility and conflict between the plugins 'Personal Skin' (1.0.2) by LeXuS, '[Source 2013] Custom Chat Colors' (3.1.0) by Dr. McKay, VIP Skins, and VIP CHAT on a Counter-Strike: Source server with SourceMod. Specifically, whether these plugins will work together without issues, how skins and chat colors will be loaded and prioritized, and if duplicate download paths need to be managed across multiple plugin configuration files.
solution: The plugins should generally work together without major conflicts, provided that each player's Steam ID is correctly configured in the respective plugin settings. For skins, the VIP Skins plugin can inherit or override the 'Personal Skin' configurations by adding appropriate entries to `addons/sourcemod/data/vip/modules/downloadlist.txt`. There is no need to duplicate download paths if they are already specified in another file; ensure that each plugin's configuration correctly references the intended download list without redundancy, allowing SourceMod to handle skin loading efficiently. Chat colors set via '[Source 2013] Custom Chat Colors' will not interfere with VIP CHAT settings as long as Steam IDs are properly managed across both plugins.
title: Совместимость плагинов

problem: The server is experiencing repeated connection timeouts and failed socket connections to the SourceMod Master Server, as well as exceptions related to being unable to open admin log files (e.g., '/servers/2750/cstrike/addons/sourcemod/logs/admins/admin__STEAM_0-0-5402238.log'). These errors indicate issues with network connectivity to the master server and file access permissions for logging.
solution:
1. Verify that the server's firewall or network settings allow outbound connections on the necessary ports (typically 27015 for SourceMod). Ensure no local network restrictions are blocking these connections.
2. Check the configuration of `warmod_manager.smx` to confirm it is correctly set up with valid master server URLs and timeouts.
3. Ensure that the log directory `/servers/2750/cstrike/addons/sourcemod/logs/admins/` exists, has proper write permissions for the SourceMod process, and that any symbolic links or paths are correct.
4. Restart the SourceMod service after making configuration changes to apply them.
5. Monitor logs for subsequent attempts to confirm the issues are resolved.
title: Помощь в логах/Warmod (retake)

problem: The plugin 'killer_info_display.smx' and 'om_propspawn_sernix.smx' are failing to load in Counter-Strike: Source due to missing language phrases and game events. Additionally, the overlay file for 'zombiereloaded.smx' is missing.
solution: Rewrite parts of the plugins to ensure compatibility with CS:S by updating event names and checking for existing game classes and parameters in the datamaps. Ensure all referenced models, sounds, and overlay files are present or correctly configured.
title: Плагин не работает

problem: The custom skin for the M4A1 silencer in Counter-Strike: Source has an unrendered texture, and no error messages appear in the server or client console. The issue appears after a server restart and persists even after reinstalling the model on the client side.
solution: The missing texture file 'models\weapons\natribu.org\m4a2_1\halo.vtf' referenced in the halo.vmt is absent from both the load paths and the archive. Replacing or correctly placing this texture file should resolve the problem.
title: Баг с  Сustom Weapons

problem: KeyValues Error: LoadFromBuffer: missing { in file addons/sourcemod/configs/adminmenu_custom.txt
solution: The adminmenu_custom.txt configuration file is missing a required '{' character, causing the KeyValues parser to fail. The file likely has an incomplete or malformed block of key-value pairs that needs to be corrected.
title: Помогите с error

problem: The user wants to enable chat logging for the FSA (Firewall Super Admin) plugin in Counter-Strike: Source, displaying messages like '[FSA] <Admin nickname> placed <Item name>', '[FSA] <Admin nickname> unfolded <Item name>', and '[FSA] <Admin nickname> removed <Item name>'. The downloaded version of the plugin from a specific link has chat logging disabled.
solution: Download the correct FSA plugin version that includes enabled chat logging. The user mistakenly linked to a translated version where chat logging was turned off, so obtaining the proper version will resolve the issue.
title: Нужна помощь с FSA

problem: The user is trying to remove an auto-buy plugin from VIP in Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) using a map config file. The plugin gets unloaded, but all other VIP functions are inaccessible, and the plugin does not re-enable on other maps.
solution: None provided in the given text.

problem: Необходимо отсортировать пункты администраторского меню в Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) таким образом, чтобы определенный пункт был перемещен в другое меню (например, в 'Управление сервером' меню 'Управления Blocked Passes'). Однако существующая система сортировки администраторского меню не поддерживает такие глобальные перемещения пунктов между меню.
solution: Решение заключается в том, чтобы напрямую исправить соответствующий плагин SourceMod или обратиться к авторам SourceMod с просьбой добавить поддержку глобальных перемещений пунктов администраторского меню. Временно, можно попробовать настроить сортировку через файл конфигурации `adminmenu_sorted`, но это может быть ограничено и не даст полного решения для перемещения пункта в другое меню.
title: Сортировка админ меню

problem: Players spawn at the beginning of a round with knives instead of pistols, and there is a black-and-white screen for a couple of seconds before returning to normal view.
solution: Install and configure the [CS: Source] - Start weapon plugin version 1.2 correctly; ensure it is properly set up in the server's plugins directory and that any necessary configuration options are adjusted as per the plugin documentation.
title: Как сделать - Ножи; Черно белый экран - в начале раунда.

problem: Перенести существующий Counter-Strike: Source (CSS) сервер, работающий на Windows, на Linux, сохраняя все конфигурации, плагины и ресурсы.
solution:
1. Скачать линуксовую версию CSS сервера.
2. Вытащить с Windows-сервера все файлы конфигураций из папок: cfg, cfg/sourcemod, cfg/vip, cfg/shop, addons/sourcemod/configs, addons/sourcemod/data, materials, models, sound, particles, maps и другие связанные с сервером.
3. Скопировать плагины Sourcemod из папок addons/sourcemod/plugins, addons/sourcemod/scripting и addons/sourcemod/translations.
4. Установить Sourcemod для Linux на новый сервер.
5. Перенести все выделенные файлы и папки на Linux-сервер.
6. Запустить сервер и проверить с помощью команды `sm plugins list` наличие ошибок, установив отсутствующие плагины (например, PTaH) для линуксовой версии.
title: как перенести собранный сервер css с OC Windows на Linux.

problem: Feature 'QuickDefuse' is already defined when loading the VIP_Core.smx plugin in SourceMod for Counter-Strike: Source, causing an exception.
solution: Check the plugins folder and the plugins/vip subfolder for duplicate instances of QuickDefuse. Remove the older version of the QuickDefuse plugin to resolve the conflict.
title: Помогите с логами в css

problem: The server is crashing due to the error 'ED_Alloc: no free edicts', indicating that there are no available entity slots (edicts) left, likely caused by excessive spawning of smoke grenade projectiles.
solution: Remove or disable the automatic dispensing of smoke grenades in the CSDM plugin, as identified by tonline_kms65_1. Alternatively, fork and fix the problematic plugin.
title: CRASH: Нет свободных эдиктов - Помогите разобраться

problem: The rank system plugin on the server deducts points from new players upon death, causing their statistics to deteriorate due to one-time players. The issue is that new players should gain 2 points per kill until they have killed 50 opponents, rather than having points deducted.
solution: Remove the point deduction for new players and implement a system where new players receive +2 points per kill until they reach 50 kills, preventing their statistics from being negatively impacted by one-time players.
title: [-ARMY-] Ranks Core

problem: Multiple mg_ maps in Counter-Strike: Source are not functioning correctly, failing to spawn projectiles or break objects despite having sound and integrity intact.
solution: Disable the sv_turbophysics variable by setting it to 0 (sm_cvar sv_turbophysics 0) and restart the round. This should normalize player physics, allowing players to be affected by physical object impacts and being thrown as intended.
title: Проблема с mg_ картами

problem: The server experiences physics crashes and unreasonable position errors from vphysics for entities like weapon_flashbang, healthkit_411, and weapon_glock when sv_turbophysics is set to 0 or 1. The issue persists regardless of player count and has been tested with various plugins disabled without success.
solution: Rename the 'addons' folder to 'addons1' and restart the server without SourceMod (sm) and Metamod (mm) to determine if the problem is related to these plugins.
title: Ignoring unreasonable position from vphysics!

problem: Players on a Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) server are experiencing garbled chat colors, specifically affecting only the opposing team. The issue is not reflected in server logs. A long list of plugins is provided, including several VIP-related plugins and 'name_colors.smx'. Load errors indicate failed loading for certain SMAC and GunGame plugins.
solution: The problem is likely caused by the '[VIP] CHAT (+scp)' plugin (version 3.1.1) by R1KO, which does not fully support CS:S v34. The solution involves replacing HTML color codes (e.g., #9932CC) with supported tokens like {GREEN}, {TEAM}, or {DEFAULT}. Ensure the correct configuration for CS:S is used and remove any leftover unsupported color definitions from 'name_colors.smx'.
title: Сбой цветов чата у игроков  CS:S v34

problem: The Shavit timer plugin on a Counter-Strike: Source mini-game server allows players to choose any team (CT or T) during pass-through maps, which should only allow selection of one predetermined team. The Autoselect button currently assigns teams randomly instead of forcing the correct team, and attempts to edit spawn points via another plugin have not resolved the issue.
solution: The issue is caused by the Replay Bot plugin interfering with the Autoselect button's functionality. Disabling or configuring the Replay Bot plugin correctly will restore proper team assignment through the Autoselect button, ensuring players are automatically placed on the intended team without randomization.
title: Shavit timer, проблема с выбором нужной команды

problem: Is there a way to automatically grant a specific flag to players who are in the top-20 or have more than 10k points? Or is it only possible to manually assign them?
solution: The standard version does not support such solutions. However, if you are using Linux, I can create one.
title: Выдача флага по очкам в HLX

problem: The srcds process is loading only one CPU core on a machine with multiple cores, leading to suboptimal resource utilization. The user wants to know if Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) supports multithreading and how to optimize the setup.
solution: Counter-Strike: Source does support multithreading but not multi-core processing. Ideally, one CPU core should be allocated per server instance. Since there are 3 servers running on a machine with only 2 cores, the current installation is suboptimal. The user needs to adjust the configuration to allocate resources more efficiently, possibly by reducing the number of concurrent servers or upgrading hardware.
title: Нагрузка на ядро

problem: The server's match period timer is not correctly updating the server hostname with the remaining time during a match, and it fails to deactivate after the match ends. Additionally, the RealHostname value should be retrieved at plugin startup rather than within the timer.
solution: Retrieve the RealHostname from the convar when the plugin starts (OnPluginStart). Update the server's hostname using ServerCommand inside the MatchPeriodTimer function with the correct time string format. Ensure the timer is properly deactivated after the match period ends by checking the elapsed time against the calculated periodEnd and then triggering any necessary end-of-match logic.
title: Время игры во время матча

problem: The user is attempting to translate the QuickDefuse v0.5 plugin for Counter-Strike: Source into Russian but encounters an issue where only half of the text is translated correctly, resulting in a mix of Russian and English.
solution: Bezza provides a working version of the plugin that resolves the translation issue, indicating that using the updated plugin file solves the problem.
title: Помощь с переводом плагина QuickDefuse v0.5

problem: How to add a VIP player via the hosting console in Counter-Strike: Source using SourceMod?
solution: Use the command `sm_vipadd <steamid> <min/0=forever> <group>` to add a player to the VIP group. Ensure that the VIP plugin (v3.3.3) is installed and check the command list with `sm plugins list`.
title: Как прописать вип через консоль хостинга?

problem: There is a need for a plugin that plays music during the middle of a Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) game on a BHOP server, specifically not at the start or end but throughout the gameplay. The user wants to know if such a plugin exists and how to implement it correctly.
solution: The suggested solution is to use the 'SourceMod Radio' plugin, which allows players to choose whether they want to listen to music during the game. However, proper configuration of the plugin is necessary for it to work correctly on the server. Additionally, adding custom map-specific music can be done by the server administrator.
title: Плагин для муззыка

problem: On a CS:S server with mini-games involving boats, when a player steps onto a moving boat, the player passes through the boat and gets stuck. This issue does not occur on other servers, indicating it is specific to this server's configuration.
solution: The solution involves checking the SourceMod or plugin configurations related to collision detection and entity movement for the boat mini-game. Ensure that the boat entities are properly defined with correct collision meshes and that any custom scripts handling boat movement do not inadvertently alter player physics when boarding. Additionally, verify that server-side physics settings (e.g., `sv_airacceleration`, `sv_wateracceleration`) are correctly configured to prevent players from passing through solid objects.

problem: Players are able to see enemies on the radar through smoke in Counter-Strike: Source, regardless of whether the server is vanilla or modded with skins.
solution: Begin by checking and disabling plugins one by one (in batches of five) to identify which plugin might be causing the radar visibility bug through smoke.
title: Видимость противника на радаре сквозь дым

problem: The user is looking for a plugin that creates a zone similar to PUBG in Counter-Strike: Source (CSS:S), but they could only find one for CS 1.6 and none for CSS:S.

problem: The server occasionally needs the 're_dust' map for playing with friends.
solution: Search for the 're_dust' map in the downloaded files folder: Counter-Strike Source/cstrike/download/maps/. The map can be found there.
title: Для сервера нужна карта re_dust.

problem: The server incorrectly displays twice as many players than are actually connected. During this issue, the game crashes when connecting to the server.
solution: Install the 'Stuck Connection Kicker' plugin (v1.4) for SourceMod on the Counter-Strike: Source server. After installation, a `sck_limit` command can be used in `server.cfg` to adjust the timeout for connection attempts, preventing excessive player count display and crashes.
title: На сервере в 2 раза больше игроков показывает...

problem: When connecting to one of the servers hosted on a single machine with multiple servers sharing the same IP, after 1-2 minutes other servers disappear from the favorites list, history, etc. They reappear only after exiting the server menu or by repeatedly pressing 'Update' in the server information window. The issue is not present when connecting to external servers; our servers always show as online there. The host suspected DDoS protection but adjusting it did not help.
solution: The issue appears to be related to how SourceMod (or the game client) handles server discovery and caching for servers sharing the same IP on a single host machine. A potential solution involves ensuring that each server has a unique identifier or modifying the SourceMod configuration to correctly handle multiple servers under one IP, possibly by adjusting server discovery timeouts or disabling aggressive caching mechanisms that incorrectly mark servers as offline.
title: Странности с исчезновением серверов

problem: Настройка звуков оружия (выстрела, перезарядки, смены) в плагине custom weapon для Counter-Strike: Source.
solution: Зайти на сервер под флагом `z`, открыть консоль и выполнить команду `cw_dev`. При необходимых действиях результат будет отображаться в нижней части экрана.
title: Настройка звуков оружия в плагине custom weapon

problem: The user is looking for a plugin or method to monitor specific Steam IDs on a Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) server, tracking the playtime of selected players individually. The desired functionality includes viewing statistics such as hours played today, on a specific date, per week, month, and year, accessible only by the server administrator through an admin menu or a private PC widget.
solution: The suggested solution involves using existing plugins like 'Player Analytics' from AlliedModders or checking standard action logs located in the root log folder to track player activity. Additionally, tools such as RankMe + WEB and adminWatch were mentioned as potential options for gathering the required statistics.
title: Существует ли такой плагин? Мониторинг

problem: When the variable sm_res_randomsound is set to '1', only a limited set of tracks are played during round end in Counter-Strike: Source, leading to frequent repetition of the same track every one or two rounds. The desired solution is to have all available tracks be randomly selected for playback.
solution: Add entries at the end of the resource list file (e.g., css\mp3\1.mp3=CT) with each track listed sequentially, separated by a single space. This ensures that when sm_res_randomsound is enabled, every track in the list will be played without repetition.
title: RoundEndSound random track

problem: The server shows more connected players than are actually present, and multiple (up to 15) players connect simultaneously, causing the online count to drop significantly each day. This issue persists for hours without a server restart, even though there are no reserved slots and plugins have been unloaded.
solution: The problem is caused by malicious users changing their SteamID, resulting in a hack where a phantom slot remains occupied until the server is reloaded. The recommended solution is to use the 'stuckconnectionkicker' plugin (v1.4) to address this issue.
title: Подключающиеся игроки

problem: Не могу скомпилировать плагин для Counter-Strike: Source с использованием SourceMod. При компиляции возникает ошибка 'fatal error 182: cannot read from file: "vip"'. Также отмечается, что через FTP недоступен compile.exe.
solution: Компилируйте плагин с помощью compile.exe. Приложение msl1 предоставило исправленный исходный код (viptest.sp) для компиляции, что решает проблему недоступности файла "vip".
title: Не могу скомпилировать плагин

problem: The user is unable to locate the configuration setting for adjusting the timer duration in the Shavit Timer plugin for Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S). The timer currently defaults to 20 seconds after which the player cannot join the game, and attempts to find the setting within the replay bot or source files have been unsuccessful. Additionally, the plugin causes server crashes on certain versions of SourceMod.
solution: Check the version of the Shavit Timer plugin being installed; the latest version is compiled for SourceMod 1.10 and will not function correctly with SourceMod 1.9. Ensure compatibility by using the appropriate version or updating SourceMod to 1.10.
title: Shavit Timer

problem: The Quake Sounds v 2.7.5 (Rus) mod is failing to load MP3 files due to an invalid sample rate and missing folder structure in the configuration, resulting in errors like 'Failed to create decoder for MP3' and '*** Invalid sample rate (0)'.
solution: Ensure the correct folder path is specified in the configuration file. The sound paths should include the full directory from the game's sound folder, e.g., `sound/tryedi/quakedll/assembly1/headshot.mp3`, and verify that all MP3 files are properly encoded with a valid sample rate.
title: Quake Sounds v 2.7.5 (Rus) Пробелма

problem: The user wants to disable the rank window that appears when joining a Counter-Strike: Source server, but changing settings in `army_ranks.txt` and related configuration files did not achieve this.
solution: Create or edit the file `/cfg/sourcemod/army/setting.army.cfg` and set the variable `sm_army_skill_army_menu` to `0.0`. This will disable the rank window upon server entry.
title: Окно ранга при входе на сервер

problem: The game crashes for everyone on the server when a player dies with a specific skin.
solution: Fix or change the problematic skin.

problem: Program that substitutes Steam IDs on a server, allowing account evasion and filling slots with empty accounts.
solution: Refer to the video posted twice in this forum for details on the new vulnerability (v90) related to Steam ID substitution.
title: Подмена Steam_ID v90 и антибан

problem: Repeated server hacks targeting the admin panel (admin backend) on a Counter-Strike: Source server running GameCMS. The user is seeking a solution beyond simply removing an emulator.
solution: Secure the admin panel by setting it to password protection.
title: Взломы сервера.

problem: The FogZ configuration created for CS:GO does not work in Counter-Strike: Source (CSS) because it uses the command `sv_skyname italy`, which is not recognized in CSS. The user seeks a way to modify the FogZ.cfg so that it functions correctly in both CSS and CS:GO, automatically enabling on map changes and allowing easy disabling with a single command (`exec FogZ_off`).
solution: The solution involves adjusting the FogZ.cfg configuration to use skybox commands compatible with CSS. Specifically, replace `sv_skyname italy` with an appropriate CSS-compatible skybox command (e.g., `sv_skyname office` or another valid CSS skybox). Additionally, implement a mechanism within the cfg to automatically execute on map changes and provide a simple command (`exec FogZ_off`) to disable the fog effect when needed.
title: создание тумана на картах для CFG

problem: The server logs are showing errors, specifically: 1) The database connection fails with the message 'can't connect to local MySQL server through socket '/tmp/mysql.sock' (2)', and 2) A plugin is only functioning on selected game hosting services. The issue is further described in an attached log file.
solution: The root cause appears to be using a compiled plugin from a school hosting service that is locked to that specific host. The recommended solution is to replace all plugins with those obtained directly from the SourceMod website, or ideally, recompile the server with original plugins to resolve the compatibility and database connection issues.
title: Ошибки в логах.

problem: The admins.cfg file contains unknown group names that are not defined in the admin_groups.cfg file, causing parsing errors when SourceMod attempts to load the configuration. Specifically, groups like 'Root[L0]', 'Admin[L2]', 'Moderator[L3]', 'Admin[L1]', and 'Admin+VIP[L2+VIP]' are referenced but missing from the group definitions.
solution: Ensure that all group names used in admins.cfg exactly match those defined in admin_groups.cfg. Correct any typos, ensure consistent capitalization (e.g., use 'Root[L0]' instead of 'root[l0]'), and verify that the groups are properly listed in admin_groups.cfg with matching identifiers.
title: Ошибки парсинга admins.cfg

problem: After installing the observation plugin for a Counter-Strike: Source server and adding it to `adminmenu_custom.txt`, unnecessary commands appear in the menu under 'Observation of others'. The user needs guidance on how to remove these unwanted commands from the menu item.
solution: The source code of the observation plugin must be edited. Specifically, locate the part of the plugin that defines the menu options and remove or modify the entries for the unnecessary commands. The relevant source can be found in the provided ZIP file: https://hlmod.net/attachments/observe-client_v1-2-3-zip.2987/
title: Разбор меню наблюдения за игроком

problem: There is a delay after player death in Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) before switching to another player's camera view. The user wants to eliminate or minimize this delay so that the camera switches immediately (or as quickly as possible) after a player dies.
solution: Set the variable `mp_forcecamera` to 1, which forces the game to switch to another player's camera immediately after a death. Alternatively, consider creating a plugin to achieve the same effect if no suitable variable exists.
title: Задержка после смерти

problem: The issue is that in the team status information for Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S), instead of displaying the unique identifier (UID) in the format 'uniqueid (U:X:XXXXX)', it shows the SteamID ('STEAM_X:X:XXXXX'). The user is asking if there is a console variable (cvar) that can be configured to change the display format of the status information on the server.
solution: The solution suggested by GoDtm666 is to write an additional plugin that would convert the UID output to SteamID. This plugin would modify how the status information is displayed, ensuring that the correct identifier format (either UID or SteamID) is shown as desired.
title: Информация команды status

problem: How to increase the jump height of a player in Counter-Strike: Source using SourceMod, specifically modifying the vertical speed during a jump without affecting gravity or causing unintended movement behaviors.
solution: Use the `OnPlayerRunCmdPost` hook to detect when a player initiates a jump (`buttons & IN_JUMP`) while on the ground (`GetEntityFlags(client) & FL_ONGROUND`). Increase the vertical component of the player's velocity by adding a boost value (`fBoost`) to the existing velocity vector. Teleport the entity with the modified velocity to apply the change. Example code provided in the forum thread demonstrates this approach.
title: Изменение характеристик игрока (SetEntPropFloat)

problem: How to block the 'custom' folder on a CS:S server so that it prevents players from using custom VPK files while keeping server models, skins, music, and other official content functional.
solution: Set `sv_pure 1` in the server's startup command line or configuration file. Additionally, configure `pure_server_whitelist.txt` to explicitly allow only the necessary server-side files (e.g., models, sounds) while blocking custom VPKs placed by players.
title: блокировка папки кастум в ксс

problem: The user is asking for private race configurations (privat rassы) compatible with WCSource version 9.1, specifically seeking a method to distribute these races across all private maps.
solution: A straightforward approach involves setting the 'required' parameter to '9999999' to make the level available to everyone on private maps. Alternatively, one can request a scripter to implement a condition where if 'required' is set to '-1', it checks a configuration file that specifies the Steam ID and which race has access.
title: ребят помогите с приват расами для WCSource 9.1

problem: Need to find a specific plugin urgently.
solution: The plugin 'ucp_players_list.sp' and its SourceMod version 'ucp_players_list.smx' are provided in the attachments.
title: UCP Players List

problem: Players experience a significantly longer afterglow duration from flashbangs on all servers, especially when the flashbang is first used by the player themselves and then by an opponent. The issue persists across different setups.
solution: The prolonged flashbang afterglow effect can be caused by anti-cheat plugins such as AntiFesh or AntiVh that increase the flash duration. Checking and adjusting these anti-cheat settings, or disabling them if unnecessary, should resolve the problem.
title: Помощь с флешакми

problem: The user wants to completely disable the `sm plugins` command and its variants (e.g., `sm plugins 0`, `11`, `22`, etc.) so that players cannot view the list of server plugins.
solution: Modify or recompile SourceMod to block the `sm plugins` console command. This can be achieved by registering a command listener for `sm plugins` and handling it in a way that prevents its execution, effectively hiding the plugin list from players.
title: Запрет команды sm plugins ...

problem: The user is unable to locate where demo recordings are saved on a Counter-Strike: Source server running SourceMod plugin ADMIN DEMORECORD V.0.4, and does not know how to specify the path for saving demos.
solution: Create a folder (e.g., 'demo') within the cstrike directory on the Windows server. Then, configure the plugin by specifying this folder in the configuration file using the command `demorec_folder`. If no folder is specified, demos will be stored in the root mod directory (cstrike), but without explicit path setting, demos may not appear as expected.
title: Настройка плагина SOURCETV ADMIN DEMORECORD V.0.4

problem: Modify the Zprops + HP plugin so that only zombies can break props, while human-controlled props are breakable by zombies but not by other humans. Additionally, reduce the spawn distance of props to prevent them from being placed at excessively long ranges (e.g., 100 km). The server is running SourceMod 1.10.0.6236, Metamod:Source version 1.11.0-dev+1099, and Zombie:Reloaded on version v90.
solution:
Develop a custom plugin modification that implements the following logic:
1. Check if the entity attempting to break a prop is a zombie.
   - If true, allow the break regardless of who owns the prop.
2. If the entity is human, check if the prop owner is also human.
   - If both are human, deny the break action.
3. Introduce a spawn distance limit for props by adjusting the plugin's configuration or code to restrict prop placement within a specified radius (e.g., 100 meters) from designated spawn points.
4. Ensure compatibility with the existing server setup by testing the modified plugin on the SourceMod and Metamod versions provided.
title: zprops + hp

problem: After installing the '[-ARMY-] Ranks Core v1.0.0' (2.0.2 Alpha Test) by sahapro33 for CS:Source, the server crashes with errors indicating an invalid parameter number and invalid timer handles in the army.smx and army_ranks_hud_info.smx scripts.
solution: The issue is likely due to changes in function parameters within the core includes of the Army Ranks HUD script. Ensure that the script is compiled against the same SourceMod version running on the server, or update the script to match any parameter changes in the core functions.
title: Army ranks HUD INFO краш

problem: When trying to apply custom skins for the Zombie Reloaded (ZR) mod on version V90 of Counter-Strike: Source, the mod stops working. The issue does not occur on version V34 where similar skins were previously applied successfully.
solution: The error log indicates a fatal parsing error in the translation file 'zr_lasermines.txt' due to a missing or invalid model path ('models/player/kuristaja/l4d2/hunter_arms/v_knife_t.mdl'). To resolve this, ensure that all referenced models exist and are correctly located within the mod's directory. problem: Players on Counter-Strike: Source servers are experiencing repeated console errors stating 'Failed to create decoder for MP3', which spam the console and eventually cause the CSS client to crash. The issue affects a small percentage of players (2-5 out of 100) and appears more frequently after recent updates to CSS.
solution: The memory leak in the game engine causes excessive memory consumption when these errors start spamming, leading Windows to prevent further memory allocation once approximately 2.5GB is reached, resulting in client termination. The recommended fix involves addressing the underlying memory leak; however, a practical workaround suggested includes deleting all files in the Counter-Strike Source/cstrike/download/sound directory to potentially resolve the issue.

problem: The Server Hop plugin (v0.8.1) and redirect.amx are not functioning correctly to allow players to switch servers by typing !servers, selecting a server, and pressing F3 in CS:S v90. The menu appears but closes immediately without transitioning to the selected server, despite attempts on multiple PCs with both Steam and non-Steam versions of the game and various plugin configurations.
solution:
Configure the Server Hop plugin by editing the `serverhop.cfg` file located at `/addons/sourcemod/configs/serverhop.cfg`. Add entries for each server in the format:

```
"Server Name" {
    "address" "IP_address"
    "port" "port_number"
}
``` 
Replace "Server Name", "IP_address", and "port_number" with the appropriate values for your servers. This configuration will enable the !servers command to list available servers, allow selection, and transition using F3.
title: Переход между Серверами

To activate it on Dust 2, use the command `sm_knife_arena_create <x> <y> <z>` to place the arena, then `sm_knife_arena_save` to save, and optionally `sm_knife_arena_delete` to remove.

Remove entries for commands such as `sm_slay`, `sm_burn`, `sm_beacon`, `sm_freeze`, `sm_timebomb`, `sm_firebomb`, and `sm_freezebomb`. Alternatively, use the `admin_overrides.cfg` file to disable specific admin commands by setting their values to 'z' (denying access) or 'b' (allowing only certain actions). Restart the server after making changes to apply them.

problem: The user is trying to compile a SourceMod extension (*.so) on Debian Linux but lacks clear instructions. They have cloned the SourceMod repository and attempted to run `python ../configure.py`, but encountered an error: 'No command 'ambuild' found, did you mean: Command 'cmbuild' from package 'infernal''. The user is unsure where to place the extension sources and how to proceed with the compilation.
solution: Follow the instructions from the AlliedModders Wiki for building SourceMod. Steps include cloning AMBuild (`git clone https://github.com/alliedmodders/ambuild`), installing it (`cd ambuild && C:\Python27\python.exe setup.py install` or `python setup.py install` on Linux), placing the extension source in a directory next to the cloned SourceMod repository, navigating into that directory, creating a 'build' subdirectory, and running `mkdir build`, `cd build`, `python ../configure.py`, followed by `ambuild`. Ensure AMBuild is installed correctly (possibly requiring root/sudo privileges) and verify the path to SourceMod if needed.
title: Компиляция extensions

problem: The user wants to create a plugin for Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) using SourceMod that allows an administrator to define a command limit in a configuration file (CFG). The goal is to let players use a specific command (e.g., `sm_ban`) only once per round, with the number of allowed uses set via the CFG. The user has seen examples without CFG support and is unsure if they are functional.
solution:
The provided plugin code accomplishes this by:
1. Registering a console command (`test`) to check the remaining uses of a specified command.
2. Hooking the `round_start` event to reset the usage counters for all players at the beginning of each round.
3. Creating a configuration variable (`sm_limit`) via `CreateConVar` to set the maximum number of allowed command uses per player, which is loaded from an auto-executed config file.
4. Implementing the `test` action to decrement the remaining uses when invoked and notify the player of their current usage status.
5. Resetting individual player limits upon disconnection to ensure proper tracking across rounds.
title: Лимит использования команд в раунд.

problem: The [VIP] Admin Privileges plugin is not correctly assigning admin flags for custom weapons and trails to VIP players. Specifically, the flag 't' intended for VIP-only access to [VIP] Custom_Weapon models and CSS Trails is not being recognized when set through the [VIP] Admin Privileges configuration, leading to no access despite correct settings in other contexts (e.g., via SourceBans). The issue appears related to timing checks during player admin privilege verification before VIP status is fully loaded.
solution: Modify the plugin source code by adding an event handler for VIP client loading to ensure flags are checked after VIP status is confirmed. problem: При просмотре демок на сервере, установленном с автоматической записью и последующей отправкой на хостинг, возникает ошибка Host_Error: CL_CopyExistingEntity: missing client entity [номер], где номер может быть разным (например, 22, 2, 17). Это приводит к обрыву демки примерно на 3-6 минут. В некоторых случаях демка доходит до конца, но большинство из них завершается с ошибкой.
solution:
Возможны следующие шаги для решения проблемы:
1. Проверить настройки плагина записи демок и убедиться, что он корректно обрабатывает все клиентские сущности.
2. Отладить скрипт, который вытягивает демки и отправляет их на WEB, чтобы убедиться, что данные о клиентских сущностях сохраняются корректно.
3. Проверить настройки архивации демок и убедиться, что процесс не повреждает информацию о клиентских сущностях.
4. Если проблема связана с элементами игры (крыльями, шапками, питомцами), проверить настройки этих элементов и убедиться, что они не вызывают конфликтов при записи демок.
5. Возможно, потребуется обновление или настройка плагина записи демок или скриптов для совместимости с текущей версией сервера и модификаций.
title: Ошибка при просмотре демок

problem: The DeadChat plugin for Counter-Strike: Source is experiencing an error where the native 'StartMessage' reports that it cannot execute a new message because one is already in progress. This results in spamming of the error message and prevents proper chat functionality.
solution: The issue arises from attempting to send multiple messages simultaneously without properly managing the usermessage state. To resolve this, ensure that each message initiation is properly queued or delayed until the previous message has completed execution. Specifically, modify the `PrintGameChatMessage` function to check if a message is already in progress before starting a new one, and implement a mechanism (such as a flag or timer) to prevent concurrent message starts. Additionally, verify that all hooks and callbacks are correctly synchronized to avoid race conditions.
title: [DeadChat] Errors

problem: The player wants to implement a sound effect when an admin bans or mutes a player on a Counter-Strike: Source server using SourceMod. The desired plugin was observed on some servers but could not be found in the standard list of plugins (e.g., ggg.smx, rr.smx). The user needs guidance on how to achieve this functionality.
solution:
Install the 'SM Warn System v1.1.0' plugin, which supports sound playback upon warnings/bans. Follow these steps:
1. Place the smx file in `addons/sourcemod/plugins/`.
2. Place the translation file in `addons/sourcemod/translations/`.
3. Copy configuration files (`sm_warn_reasons.cfg`, `sm_unwarn_reasons.cfg`, `sm_resetwarn_reasons.cfg`, `sm_warn_agreement.cfg`) to `addons/sourcemod/configs/`.
4. Place `SM_warn.cfg` in `cfg/sourcemod/`.
5. Configure the database settings in `addons/sourcemod/configs/databases.cfg` (MySQL or SQLite as needed).
6. Ensure the CVAR `sm_warn_warnsound` is set to `1` and specify the sound path with `sm_warn_warnsoundpath` (e.g., `buttons/weapon_cant_buy.wav`).
7. Adjust other relevant CVARS (`sm_warn_maxwarns`, `sm_warn_max_punishment`, etc.) as required.
8. Test the plugin to confirm that a sound plays when a player is banned or muted.
title: Бан игрока со звуком

problem: The server experiences strange shooting behavior and higher ping compared to other servers with the same tickrate (66ticks). The lerp value ranges from 10-12, appearing orange instead of the expected normal color. The user seeks guidance on adjusting rates or implementing a plugin to improve connection stability and shooting accuracy.
solution:
To address the issue, consider the following steps:
1. **Adjust Lerp Settings**: Increase the lerp value to 20-25 as suggested by the user to achieve a more stable orange-to-white color transition.
2. **Check Plugin Interference**: Verify if the 'SM Parachute' plugin (and any other parachute-related plugins) is affecting shooting mechanics. Temporarily disable it to see if performance improves.
3. **Optimize Server Configuration**: Ensure server tickrate settings are correctly configured and that no conflicting plugins are altering network parameters.
4. **Consult Plugin Developers**: For specific plugins like 'SM Parachute', consult their documentation or contact the developers for advice on compatibility with high-precision shooting.
5. **Community Support**: Reach out to the community via the provided VK link (Aleksandr Mironov) for additional insights and potential fixes.

problem:
Players exhibit two distinct bugs in Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S):
1. Animation bug causing players to appear as if they are sitting on their knees while running, leading to hitbox issues where bullets above the player's body do not deal damage despite them standing.
2. Stuck bug where certain players freeze at spawn points or random locations, spinning in place and being invisible to other players who have encountered this issue with another affected player.
solution:
The bugs are identified as engine (source) issues, not related to SourceMod (SM) or Metamod:Source (MM). The recommended fixes are:
- Restart the game client or reconnect to the server.
- Initiate a demo recording; this forces the server to send a full set of map data, allowing the client to reprocess everything from scratch and resolve the stuck issue.
- Report the problem directly to Valve via GitHub as it is an engine-level bug affecting both CS:S and TF2 on various game modes.
title: Игроки бегают на корточках и стоят на одном месте

problem: The spawned prop is appearing perpendicular to the player and needs to be oriented correctly so that it always faces the player horizontally.
solution: Use GetClientEyeAngles to obtain the player's viewing angles, then adjust the teleportation angles accordingly. Specifically, replace the incorrect angle manipulation with a direct assignment of the eye angles to the prop's orientation: `GetClientEyeAngles(client, VecAngles); TeleportEntity(prop, VecOrigin, VecAngles, NULL_VECTOR);` This ensures the prop is oriented correctly relative to the player's view.
title: Spawn prop vector

problem: The user is experiencing poor quality of trail textures in Counter-Strike: Source when creating them using Photoshop and VTFEdit. The issue seems to be related to the alpha channel, file format settings, and possibly the maximum allowed texture size during import/export.
solution:
To improve the quality of trail textures, follow these steps:
1. Ensure the image has a transparent background (alpha channel) properly set in Photoshop.
2. Export the image as a BMP or PNG with transparency before importing into VTFEdit.
3. In VTFEdit, import the file using the recommended settings: enable 'Anisotropic' and disable 'Level of Detail'.
4. Set the texture size to 256x256 for optimal quality without excessive file size increase.
5. Verify that the original image quality is high and has been edited correctly in Photoshop before conversion.
title: Трейлы для CS:S

problem: The server is unable to enforce custom bandwidth rates (sv_minrate, sv_maxrate, sv_minupdaterate, sv_maxupdaterate, sv_mincmdrate, sv_maxcmdrate) for all players. The issue persists even after attempting to modify these variables in the server configuration and despite having zBlock installed, which overrides some server settings. Players report poor shooting performance, suggesting that their effective rates are not being set as intended.
solution: To resolve the issue, manually set the client command rate (`cl_cmdrate`) to a lower value (e.g., 30) on each player's machine and verify that the server enforces these settings. Adjust the server configuration to use higher `sv_minrate` and `sv_maxrate` values (e.g., 80000 or 100000) to reduce lag, while keeping `sv_minupdaterate`, `sv_maxupdaterate`, `sv_mincmdrate`, and `sv_maxcmdrate` at 66. Ensure that `sv_client_cmdrate_difference` is set to 0. Note that this behavior was historically possible without plugins in older versions (circa 2013-2014), but requires manual client adjustments or a compatible plugin on newer server versions.

Navigate to the server's `/bin` directory and rename `steamclient.so` to `steamclient_valve.so`. 4. From the archive's `/linux/bin`, copy the `steamclient.so` library into the server's `/bin` directory.

problem: Звуки от плагинов (например, Quake Sounds) в Counter-Strike: Source не проигрываются, хотя плагины установлены и работают без ошибок в логах. Возможно, это связано с неправильной настройкой звуковых файлов или проблемами с битрейтом.
solution:
Удалите указанные кэш-файлы и перезапустите клиент игры:
..\Counter-Strike Source\cstrike\sound\sound.cache
..\Counter-Strike Source\cstrike\cache\
..\Counter-Strike Source\cstrike\download\sound\sound.cache

..\Counter-Strike Source\cstrike\downloadlists\

Затем проверьте битрейт аудиофайлов и убедитесь, что они соответствуют требуемым параметрам (например, 320 kbps MP3). Это должно исправить проблему с воспроизведением звуков.

problem: The user wants to modify the volume of sounds played by the EnterSounds v1.6 plugin in Counter-Strike: Source, specifically to play at half the original volume or adjust the volume dynamically.

problem: The user is experiencing an issue with the Simple Auto Balance plugin in Counter-Strike: Source, where it incorrectly transfers players (including admins) between teams, leading to unbalanced gameplay.

problem: The player is experiencing inaccurate aiming with certain weapons in Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S), particularly the AWP and GL at close ranges. Bullets sometimes miss even when standing still, leading to frustration.
solution:
Install the `ratechecker` plugin to monitor network rates and adjust server settings as follows:

```
sv_minrate "13000"
sv_maxrate "25000"
sv_minupdaterate "33"
sv_maxupdaterate "67"
sv_mincmdrate "33"
sv_maxcmdrate "67"
sv_client_cmdrate_difference "1"
sv_client_predict 1
sv_client_interpolate 1
sv_client_min_interp_ratio -1
sv_client_max_interp_ratio -1
```
Ensure the network load is minimal and internet speed is good. Playing on local servers of your ISP at night may show a noticeable difference, as packets will arrive quickly from client to server.
title: Настройка стрельбы.

problem: There is a request for a plugin in Counter-Strike: Source that displays an overlay to players upon joining the server for 15-20 seconds.

solution: Ensure that both teams have at least one player before the round ends to trigger scoring. The error suggests that scoring (and thus the overlay) is disabled because not all teams are populated. Check the plugin configuration or server settings to confirm that `r_screenoverlay` is enabled and properly set up to display after scoring begins.

problem: After installing VIP Core 2.1.1 R and necessary modules, the admin menu became malfunctioning. The first three items work correctly, but subsequent items cause erratic behavior: selecting the player movement item opens a microphone and chat control menu, while the last item reopens the VIP administration menu. Attempts to disable plugins individually did not resolve the issue, and standard menu files appear unchanged.
solution:
The problem is with the admin menu itself, not the core. The solution involves updating to a newer core version where the menu is separated, or adding an appropriate sorting configuration in `adminmenu_sorting.txt` for VIP administration items, such as:

```
vip_admin {
    "item" "add_vip"
    "item" "edit_vip"
    "item" "del_vip"
    "item" "list_vip"
    "item" "reload_vip_players"
    "item" "reload_vip_cfg"
}
```
This configuration correctly orders the VIP administration items, resolving the menu malfunction.
title: Проблема после установки VIP Core

problem: Не получается управлять камерой при просмотре демок, записанных через Source TV, хотя все говорят об этом. Режимы от первого и третьего лица работают только если выбирать через HUD справа.
solution: Перенесите демку в папку `counter-strike source\cstrike`. Затем запустите просмотр демки одним из двух способов: 1) Введите команду `playdemo` и название демки в консоли, например `playdemo demo_123`, или 2) Нажмите `Shift + F2` во время игры CSS для вызова "ДЕМО плеера" (Demo Playback), затем загрузите нужную дему из открывшегося окна. Для удобства используйте проигрыватели `demoui` или `demoui2` для перемотки и перехода по тикам. Во время просмотра можно также использовать команды для лучшего восприятия, например `sv_cheats 1`, `r_drawothermodels 2`, `mat_fullbright 1/2`, `sv_showimpacts 1` и `cl_drawshadowtexture 1`.
title: как просматривать демки в режиме свободного полета?

problem: The server crashes when the online player count reaches 58 players. The issue persists despite no error messages, and various plugins are installed on a dedicated hosting environment with 2x4.0GHz Intel CPUs, 4GB RAM, and a 60GB SSD.
solution: The Source Dedicated Server (SRCDS) inherently supports up to 64 players for Counter-Strike: Source; attempting to exceed this limit, even by using plugins like 'Reserved Slots' or other modifications, can cause the server to crash. The recommended solution is to either reduce the number of reserved slots or adjust the plugin configuration to stay within the supported player limit (64). Additionally, ensure that no unauthorized modifications or backdoor plugins are installed that could interfere with server stability.
title: Сервер падает при онлайне 58 человек

Ensure that all Eventscripts keys are correctly defined and that any undefined commands like 'round_start_cmd' are addressed in the mod configuration. problem: Players are able to use the console command `cl_minmodels 1` on a Counter-Strike: Source server, which disables custom skins/models and makes all models standard. This is undesirable for servers with custom models (e.g., WCS). The goal is to prevent this command from being executed by any player except root/administrators.
solution: Add `sv_allowminmodels 0` to the `server.cfg` configuration file. This server-side variable disables the ability for clients to use `cl_minmodels 1`. For more granular control, administrators can manage access via SourceMod commands like `sm_cvar sv_allowminmodels <value>` or a custom plugin that registers and restricts the command using `RegConsoleCmd`.

problem: A plugin for removing items from the map was installed, which deleted many textures and caused almost all items to disappear. Attempts to reinstall the maps did not help.

problem: The Surf mod installed on a Counter-Strike: Source server is not functioning correctly. Players are unable to slide as intended, and the issue persists despite attempts to adjust server variables and restart the server.
solution:
Remove the Surf mod entirely. Instead, configure the necessary sliding parameters directly in the server's `server.cfg` file by adding the following lines:

```
sv_accelerate "8"
sv_airaccelerate "10000"
sv_maxspeed "320"
```
After adding these settings, restart the server. Avoid installing any additional Surf-related plugins or mods, as they may interfere with proper sliding functionality.
title: Не работает Surf mod

problem: How to set the tickrate to 100 on a CSS server running Steam without hosting it?
solution: Use the Tickrate Enabler v.0.4 from GitHub (https://github.com/daemon32/tickrate_enabler) and run the server with this tool, as the -tickrate 100 command was removed from CS:S in 2010 and is not supported by other Source games like TF2 and L4D(2).
title: Tikrate 100

problem: The CS:S server is experiencing lag intermittently (2-3 times per hour) during map play. The issue appears to be related to connectivity problems with a MySQL database, specifically errors like 'Lost connection to MySQL server during query' from the VIP_Core.smx plugin. Potential causes include hosting service quality, server configuration, and possibly Level-Rank settings.
solution: Upgrade to a more recent version of the VIP plugin (e.g., v3.0 DEV #24) which reportedly resolves database connectivity issues. Additionally, consider switching to a better hosting provider than cw-serv, as multiple users have reported similar lag problems with this service. Verify server hardware adequacy for 36 slots and review or disable resource-intensive plugins like SMAC if necessary.
title: Лагает сервер css v89 no steam

problem: The user wants to know how to modify the color of a downloaded weapon skin model in Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) after replacing the standard models with custom ones.
solution: To change the color of a downloaded weapon skin model in CS:S, you need to edit the model's texture or material file. This typically involves using 3D modeling software like Blender or MilkShape to open the .mdl file, locate the texture/material responsible for the color (often found in the .vtf or .vmt files), and recolor it to the desired shade (e.g., black). After editing, re-export the model and replace the original skin file on your server or local installation. Alternatively, some community tools or scripts may automate this process if available.
title: Редактирование моделей оружия CSS

problem: The user needs a script for their CS:S server website to display the current map, number of players, and other relevant information. Additionally, they need a solution to securely embed this monitoring on an SSL-protected site without encountering mixed content warnings.
solution: Use HTTPS URLs for all embedded scripts and images from external sources (e.g., replace `http://cache.gametracker.com/` with `https://cache.gametracker.com/`, and similarly update image URLs). Ensure that the monitoring script is loaded over HTTPS to avoid mixed content issues on an SSL-protected site. Contact the server's tracking service provider (e.g., GameTracker) for support in enabling HTTPS access if necessary.
title: Web script. Мониторинг сервера на сайте.

problem: На сервере с модом GunGame при переходе на NADE LEVEL постоянно появляется первая граната, и после её броска она вновь появляется в руке при переключении на другое оружие, что затрудняет игру.

problem: Random visual effect appears on any player when the 'use' button (Е) is pressed. This issue started unexpectedly on a Counter-Strike: Source server without any recent modifications or plugin installations.
solution: Check for plugins using the `+use` command and inspect the `player_use IN_USE 1 << 5 OnPlayerUse !activator !pvsplayer !speechtarget` event. Ensure that any custom effects are properly precached via `PrecacheModel` with paths like 'sprites/', 'materials/effects/', or 'materials/sprites/'. Review server plugins for unintended use of the `+use` command.
title: [Баг] Появление странного эффекта на игроке

problem: Need a way to achieve maximum braking when a player releases movement buttons, specifically minimizing the forward momentum after landing from a jump on a bunnyhop (bhop) server in Counter-Strike: Source.
solution:
Set the following SourceMod and server variables:
- `sv_enablebunnyhopping 1`
- `sv_staminamax 0`
- `sv_staminajumpcost 0`
- `sv_staminalandcost 0`
- `sv_staminarecoveryrate 0`
- `sv_airaccelerate 9999`
- `sv_accelerate_use_weapon_speed 0`
- `sv_autobunnyhopping 1`
- `sv_maxvelocity 3500`
Additionally, experiment with server variables like `sv_friction`, `sv_waterfriction`, and `sv_stopspeed` to fine-tune the braking effect.
title: Помогите найти нужный параметр.

problem: After completely removing the VIP plugin, certain players still retain admin privileges.

problem: After installing the timer HUD in Counter-Strike: Source, a whistling sound starts playing.

problem: Players can be killed through walls or obstacles with a delay, indicating an issue where bullets pass through solid objects when viewed from the player's perspective.

Specifically, set `sv_minupdaterate` and `sv_maxupdaterate` to 66, `sv_client_min_interp_ratio` to 0, `sv_client_max_interp_ratio` to 1, and ensure appropriate values for `sv_maxrate` and `sv_minrate`. Additionally, consider disabling or updating the 'Resurrect' plugin as it may be causing invalid entity errors.

problem: How to change the color of '(ALL)' from green to any other color in a chat message using SourceMod in Counter-Strike: Source?
solution: Use the escape sequence \x07RrGgBb where R, r, G, g, B, b are hexadecimal digits representing the red, green, and blue components of the desired color. For example, to set a custom bright yellow color, you would use \x07FFFF00.

problem: The player wants to force a map re-download for all players when they join the server, in order to update the map version while keeping the same map name. Simply re-uploading the map would cause compatibility issues because the hash (or comparison value) of the new map would differ from the old one, leading to errors and confusion for some players.
solution: It is not possible to force a map re-download with the same name if the underlying content (such as the map's hash or modifications) has changed. If the map size differs or any part of the map data changes, the server cannot automatically trigger a forced re-download without causing errors. Therefore, the only viable solution is to either wait for players to manually update their maps or change the map name to ensure compatibility.

problem: When adding a new prop to the FSA menu in Counter-Strike: Source, half of the prop sinks below ground. The issue is likely due to the model's center not being at its geometric center, causing incorrect placement relative to the ground.
solution: Adjust the spawn coordinates by calculating the minimum Z value of the model using `GetEntPropVector` and adjusting the origin accordingly before teleporting the entity with `TeleportEntity`. Specifically, use `GetEntPropVector(ent, Prop_Data, "m_vecMins", min)` and then set `VecOrigin[2] -= min[2]` before calling `TeleportEntity(prop, VecOrigin, VecAngles, NULL_VECTOR)`. Grey83 provided a fix in the FSA 1.3.1.sp and .smx files.
title: Новый пропс в FSA!

problem: Unable to load SourceBans extension due to missing MySQL driver and shared library issues on a Debian 8 x86_64 VDS server. The error messages indicate that the 'libstdc++.so.6' file is not found and the MySQL driver cannot be located.
solution:
Install the required 32-bit development libraries for MySQL support on a 64-bit Debian system by running the following commands:

```bash
sudo apt-get install lib32stdc++-4.8-dev
sudo apt-get install lib32z1 lib32z1-dev
sudo apt-get install libc6-dev-i386 libc6-i386
```
