problem: The server displays the message 'Your server needs to be restarted in order to receive the latest update' after installing a licensed CS:GO on a Linux-based Steam server. The issue persists despite attempts to isolate the server from updates.
solution: Set the `sv_pure` parameter to 2 (or use `-nomaster` if applicable) to prevent the server from checking for updates and enforce stricter file integrity checks, effectively isolating it from unwanted update requests.
title: Как убрать "Your server needs to be restarted in order to receive the latest update."

problem: The user is looking for a standalone plugin that can give weapons to a player upon their respawn/rebirth in Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S), without including the full Deathmatch menu or additional features like those found in CSSDM.
solution: Use the Market plugin, which provides a simple way to distribute weapons to players upon respawn without bundling unnecessary features.
title: Плагин для выдачи оружия в CSS

problem: Сервер с маленьким пингом идёт в поиске дольше, чем сервер с высоким пингом, и требуется ускорение обнаружения сервера в списке найденных серверов.
solution: Установите регион (sv_region) соответствующий стране пользователя, используйте стандартный порт 27015 для быстрой индексации и разместите сервер на оптимизированном хостинге (например, QuakeHost) для улучшения показателей.
title: Долго ищет сервер

problem: Необходимо создать базу данных MySQL с правильной кодировкой для поддержки русских ников и работы нескольких плагинов, которые используют эту базу. Из-за неправильной кодировки символы русский языка сохраняются как кракозябры (неверно отображаемые символы). Необходимо определить, какая кодировка должна быть у базы и таблиц в MySQL для корректной работы с русскими никами.
solution: Создайте базу данных MySQL с кодировкой utf8_general_ci. Это обеспечит правильное отображение русских символов. Если используются плагины, которые не поддерживают utf-8 (например, стандартный админский плагин SM), убедитесь, что они настроены для работы с кодировкой cp1251. Также рекомендуется настроить my.cnf или параметры сервера MySQL на utf8 по умолчанию (default-character-set=utf8) и указать это в конфигурации плагинов или через SQL запросы при создании таблиц. Проверьте, что все плагины корректно обрабатывают кодировку, либо адаптируйте их для работы с utf8.
title: Создание базы данных MySQL в правильной кодировке

problem: Voice chat is not working on the CS:S server.
solution: Set `sv_use_steam_voice 0` in the server configuration.
title: Голосовой чат не работает!

problem: SourceMod throws an error at server startup, as indicated by the log excerpt: '[SDKTOOLS] Sigscan for FireOutput failed - Disabling detour to prevent crashes'. The server fails to launch.
solution: Update the game data from a snapshot (геймдату из снапшота).
title: sourcemod выдает ошибку при старте

problem: Block announcements about a player connecting or disconnecting in Counter-Strike: Source using SourceMod.
solution: Use the 'Connect Announce' plugin to disable standard connection/disconnection messages. Set the custom message to empty and turn off the standard message display.
title: Блокировка сообщений о подключившемся игроке

problem: The extensions SDKHooks and Socket are not loading automatically on the server despite being installed. Manual loading with `sm exts load sdkhooks` and `sm exts load socket` is required.
solution: These extensions will load automatically only when there are plugins that explicitly require them (using an include statement). Since no active plugins depend on SDKHooks or Socket, they remain unloaded until manually loaded.
title: Вопрос по SDKHooks & Socket

problem: Creating a plugin for Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) that allows bots to play in Free For All (FFA) mode, where each bot acts independently and shoots both enemy and allied players.
solution: Use the `bot_allow_rogues` setting in the CS:S server configuration. Setting it to `1` enables bots to occasionally 'go rogue', meaning they ignore radio commands and map objectives, allowing them to shoot all players including teammates.
title: Режим FFA для ботов

problem: After updating to CS:S V75, some users are experiencing crashes or issues with plugins, particularly on Linux servers. There is a concern about whether all mods and SourceMod components are functioning correctly post-update.
solution: The patch for the client and server containing only updated files (PATCH_CSS_v1.0.0.40-1.0.0.75_build_5066_update_25.09.12) has been provided, which includes updates from version 40 to 75. Additionally, a Linux-specific no-steam patch is available at http://narod.ru/disk/61513526001.b4c88b491de5e85b26ef6088c1031299/patch.rar.html, and a Windows no-steam server update can be found at http://narod.ru/disk/61513832001.c7e77e2526258a831fd104b48fe04017/UpServerV75.rar.html. Users are advised to apply these patches and confirm that SourceMod (1.4.7-dev) and related plugins, such as RevEmu, are operational on their respective platforms.
title: Обновление CS:S V75

problem: The user is looking for the text document that defines the playback of each sound in the game CS:S version v.34, specifically for bot conversations located at 'sound/bot'. The existing files like `game_sounds_bots.txt`, `game_sounds_hostages.txt`, and `game_sounds.txt` do not contain a comprehensive list of sounds for bots, and the user needs this document to edit the Russian language sound files.
solution: The solution provided is an attachment named 'bot.rar' containing Russian language bot conversation sounds. The path to the bot sounds in a normal client is `cstrike\sound\bot`, which confirms that the required text document for editing the bot sounds is included within this archive.
title: Замена звукоа в игре CS:S v.34

problem: The user wants to know if it is possible to place custom models for grenades and weapons on a Counter-Strike: Source server using SourceMod.
solution: A plugin needs to be commissioned from a scripter, as there is no publicly available plugin for this purpose. Additionally, while client-side replacements are possible, server-side replacements may require careful handling to ensure compatibility across different servers.
title: Модели для сервера

problem: Bans are being deleted from banned_user.cfg despite the presence of [STB2] Save Temporary Bans 2 and DAF on a CS:S v75 server running SourceMod.
solution: Ensure that the exec commands for banned_user.cfg and banned_ip.cfg are correctly placed in server.cfg as follows: exec banned_user.cfg exec banned_ip.cfg writeid writeip. Additionally, consider using SourceBans to manage bans.
title: Удаляются баны

problem: The admin menu in Counter-Strike: Source is glitching; selecting 'Наказание' (Punishment) causes the menu to jump to 'Ограничение оружия!' (Weapon Restriction!) instead of functioning correctly.
solution: Reinstall SourceMod and ensure that the wS_Map_Plugins plugin, which was improperly handling admin menu changes by only unloading plugins without affecting the menu itself, is either fixed or replaced.
title: Глючит админ-меню

problem: Players attempting to connect as the 32nd player are being disconnected with the error 'Disconnect: Connection rejected by game'. The server is configured for 33 slots but only allows 31 players.
solution: The issue likely stems from a plugin or configuration limit within SourceMod that restricts the number of concurrent connections. Review the list of loaded plugins, particularly those related to player management (e.g., 'Ban disconnected players', 'SourceMod Anti-Cheat', 'SMAC Client Protection'), and adjust their settings or disable them temporarily to allow the 32nd connection. Additionally, verify server configuration files for any hard-coded slot limits or connection rejection rules.
title: Выкидывает игрока с ошибкой Disconnect: Connection rejected by game

problem: There is a plugin on a server that plays a sound when a player reloads their weapon. The user wants to know how to implement this functionality.
solution: Use the 'Reload_Sound' plugin.
title: RELOAD

problem: Finding a plugin that allows running specific SourceMod plugins only on a particular map in Counter-Strike: Source.
solution: Use the command `sm plugins unload имя_плагина.smx` in the configuration file for the specific map to disable the plugin on all other maps.
title: Запуск плагинов на конкретной карте

problem: How to change the appearance of certain objects on a CS:S v34 server using SourceMod, specifically replacing an old wrecked car near the terrorist respawn with a sports car without modifying the client-side models.
solution: Use a SourcePawn plugin to replace the existing static prop (prop_static) by either removing it via coordinates or entity ID and then adding a new model in its place. This requires scripting within a SourcePawn environment, as standard methods like Stripper cannot directly modify or delete server-side static props.
title: Изменение пропсов/декалей на сервере.

problem: The server display shows '2/24' players in the Internet tab, but there are actually 17 players connected (17/24).
solution: Check what is displayed in the local network; the issue might be related to Steam connectivity or support limitations indicated by 'no steam=no support'.
title: Неправильно отображаются игроки

problem: При входе на сервер карты и другие ресурсы не загружаются, хотя система показывает, что все загружается. Проблема возникает на всех серверах.
solution: Проблема связана с неправильными настройками Steam Cloud и кваров в игре. Нужно сбросить настройки Steam Cloud, отключить синхронизацию Steam Cloud в настройках игры, удалить папку с игрой и переустановить игру, чтобы она установилась с дефолтными параметрами.
title: Не прогружает ничего в при входе на сервер

problem: Need a skin-pack plugin for Counter-Strike: Source that replaces standard player models with custom skins, without any admin menus or choice options between standard and server skins (similar to those on cspl and other leagues). Preferably a pre-configured plugin for easier setup.
solution: EPacker2 provided a command-line skin installation in a private message, offering a ready-to-use solution for the requested skin-pack functionality under SourceMod.

problem: Error message 'Nextmap' indicating that the mapcycle file is not found in the /css/cstrike/ directory.
solution: Ensure that the file mapcycle.txt exists in the /css/cstrike/ folder to resolve the error.

problem: How to completely disable SourceMod functionalities such as voting, map time, current time, etc., while keeping support for SourceMod plugins.

problem: Не могу найти рабочий wcs мод для последней версии Counter-Strike: Source.
solution: Ссылка на рабочий wcs мод: http://warcraft-source.com/board/index.php?action=tpmod;dl

problem: Infinite jumping plugin causing erratic or 'jerky' jump behavior on a Counter-Strike: Source server, despite correct configuration and identical settings to another working server.
solution: The issue is likely due to a conflict between the Infinite-Jumping plugin version and other plugins or an outdated/incompatible plugin source. Updating the Infinite-Jumping plugin to a compatible version (e.g., SM 1.4.7-dev) or ensuring all plugins are from official sources resolved the problem, as indicated by AlmazON's successful configuration on another server.

problem: How to configure the binding of demo recordings from a CSSource server to a website so that players can download demo recordings from mixes.

problem: Отключение облаков-дыма в небе на сервере Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S v34) с использованием SourceMod, чтобы увеличить видимость на картах, при этом сохраняя работоспособность дымовых гранат.
solution: Использовать консольную команду `sv_skyname dust` или плагин `skY`, который позволяет выбрать небо от любой карты, соответственно удаляя облака-дым и повышая видимость.

problem: A single user experiences a timeout after 2-3 minutes of gameplay on a Counter-Strike: Source server when the router is in use. The issue does not occur without the router, and there are no error messages or connection warnings.
solution: Configure the router (TP-Link WDR4300) to place the CS:S server IP address in the DMZ (or set up port forwarding for UDP ports 27005-27015). This should resolve the timeout issue experienced by the specific user.

problem: Need a plugin that creates entity objects immediately upon map start without re-running the map. The Stripper Source plugin is unsuitable because the issue lies in this specific requirement.

problem: The user is unable to install a VIP plugin on their CS:S server and is looking for a good plugin for VIP players.
solution: Purchase the plugin from wS as suggested by SaInT.P.

problem: What is the maximum value for the sv_maxrate parameter in Counter-Strike: Source v75? Is it true that it cannot exceed 20000?

For a 64-slot server, a rate of 50000-60000 is typically sufficient, with some configurations allowing up to 25000 without issues.

problem: Покупатель полной админки на сервере Counter-Strike: Source не может использовать забавные команды и перемещать игроков, хотя все флаги были прописаны. problem: The server is constantly creating mysterious 'ticket' files in the cstrike folder, accumulating thousands of them. The user does not know why these files are being created and seeks a way to prevent their creation.

problem: The user needs a plugin or method to automatically reset (clear) the password on a Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) server at regular intervals, as players often forget to remove their passwords after playing.

Alternatively, implement a custom solution using SourceMod by hooking the `player_disconnect` event and executing an `exec server.cfg` command when no players are connected, as demonstrated in the provided code snippet.

problem: The user is setting up a local Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) server and has several technical questions regarding tickrate configuration, disabling replay messages in the console, and configuring client interpolation ratios (lerp). Specifically, they are unsure where to set the tickrate, how to disable the 'No'-replayserverdir' parameter message, and why their lerp value is not matching the expected 31.
solution: Set the server parameters as follows: `sv_client_cmdrate_difference 1`, `sv_client_min_interp_ratio 2`, `sv_client_max_interp_ratio 2`, `sv_competitive_minspec 1`, and `sv_client_predict 1`. This configuration will ensure the interpolation ratio is set to 31, resolving the lerp issue. The tickrate should be configured in the server launch batch file (e.g., `tickrate 66`), and the replay message can be suppressed by adjusting these parameters as shown.
title: tickrate, replay, lerp

problem: Настройка ботов для Deathmatch (DM) сервера в Counter-Strike: Source, оптимизация параметров для лучшего функционирования и минимального нагрузки на сервер.
solution:
Использовать следующие команды для настройки ботов:
- `bot_chatter minimal` - снижение частоты использования радиокомманд.
- `bot_defer_to_human 0` - боты выполняют миссии карты.
- `bot_difficulty 1` - нормальная сложность ботов (0 - легкий, 2 - тяжелый, 3 - профессионал).
- `bot_join_after_player 1` - боты подключаются после подключения игрока.
- `bot_quota 8` - количество ботов на сервере (чем больше, тем больше нагрузка на CPU).
- `bot_quota_mode fill` - количество ботов будет равно количеству подключающихся игроков.
- `bot_auto_vacate 1` - автоматическое покидание ботами сервера для освобождения места.
- `bot_allow_grenades 1`, `bot_allow_machine_guns 1`, `bot_allow_pistols 1`, `bot_allow_rifles 1`, `bot_allow_shotguns 1`, `bot_allow_snipers 1`, `bot_allow_sub_machine_guns 1` - разрешение использования различного оружия ботами.
- Дополнительно рассмотреть плагин `dm_bot_quotas` для CSS:DM, если он доступен на версии сервера 34.
title: Настройка ботов для DM сервера

problem: The user wants to create a custom VIP plugin for Counter-Strike: Source with unique features such as increased speed, modified gravity, and removing restrictions on the AUG weapon. They are seeking advice or willing to pay someone to develop this plugin.

problem: The server is banning its own IP address shortly after starting, likely due to incorrect or conflicting rcon password settings between the server configuration and associated tools like HLStatsX. The issue persists despite checking and adjusting the rcon password in `server.cfg` and ensuring no duplicate entries.
solution: Ensure that the rcon password is consistent across all configurations (e.g., `server.cfg`, HLStatsX, SourceBans) and contains only ASCII characters without any special or Cyrillic symbols. Verify that no other plugins or services are overriding the rcon settings. Additionally, check the values of `sv_rcon_banpenalty`, `sv_rcon_maxfailures`, `sv_rcon_minfailures`, and `sv_rcon_minfailuretime` to ensure they are set appropriately to prevent false bans.
title: Сервер банит свой же ип

problem: Understanding the difference between 'задержка' (latency) and 'пинг' (ping) in Counter-Strike: Source, including how each is measured and what factors influence them.
solution: Latency refers to the time it takes for a packet of data to travel from the client to the server. Ping measures the round-trip time for packets to go from the client to the server and back again. In CS:S, latency can be observed via `net_graph 1` in the console, while ping is typically checked using external tools like `ping <Server IP>` or in-game commands that display round-trip times.
title: Задержка (Latency) и пинг (Ping)

problem: Players cannot respawn after dying in a mini-game map where everyone plays on a single team. The issue persists across different maps and is not resolved by adjusting standard server settings like `mp_forcerespawn`.
solution: Use the 'sm_mgspawn' plugin designed for MiniGame servers to enable respawning of dead players. Configure it with the following cvars: `sm_mgspawn_enable <1/0>` to toggle the plugin, `sm_mgspawn_delay <value>` to set respawn delay (recommended ≥ 1.0), and `sm_mgspawn_spawnpoints <1/0>` to enable respawning only on maps with a single team.
title: Mini-Game На картах на прохождение, где все играют за 1 команду, нельзя возродиться

problem: The user wants to limit the speed of bunnyhopping (BHop) on a Counter-Strike: Source server that has the 'Infinite Jumping' and 'BunnyHop' plugins installed, specifically through server.cfg configuration.

problem: The user wants to encrypt the text within the `GameMenu.res` file for personal purposes. However, after using several encryption programs, the encrypted file results in an empty menu when loaded into the game, leaving only a plain background image.
solution: It is not possible to encrypt the `GameMenu.res` file directly because the Source engine expects plain text configuration files. Encryption or obfuscation will not be recognized by the game client, and any attempt to hide or protect the file in this manner will fail. The only feasible approach is to set the file as read-only for basic protection, but true encryption of the menu content is unsupported.
title: Шифрование текста в GameMenu.res

problem: The user wants to configure a Counter-Strike: Source server to play up to 16 wins for one team within a maximum of 30 rounds, with two halves of 15 rounds each. After the 15th round, teams switch, and weapons and money are reset to initial values while kills/deaths statistics are preserved, similar to championship matches. The user asks if this can be achieved without any additional plugins.

problem: The user is trying to set up a GunGame server on Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) with several specific requirements: 1. Install a GunGame MOD based on SourceMod. 2. problem: The user is unable to display a multi-level admin menu in SourceMod for Counter-Strike: Source, with specific commands and permissions assigned to each level (1, 2, and 3). The issue appears to be related to the configuration or implementation of flags that control which commands are visible based on the admin's level.
solution: Implement the admin levels using flag-based permissions in SourceMod. Define separate flags for each command category (e.g., player management, map control, server commands, fan commands) and assign these flags to the appropriate admin levels. For example, Level 1 should have flags for basic player actions like kick, ban, slay, slap, mute; Level 2 adds teleport, radar, freeze, resurrect, etc.; Level 3 includes all Level 2 permissions plus advanced server controls such as map change, run configs, admin chat, start votes, password server, RCON, and additional fan commands. Ensure that the SourceMod configuration correctly references these flags to display the appropriate menu items based on the admin's level.

problem: The server startup script (start.bat) is encountering errors related to dynamic pricing and a missing material file, causing the server to fail to connect to Steam servers. Additionally, there are conflicting `maxplayers` settings in the logs.
solution:
1. Disable dynamic pricing by adding `+mp_dynamicpricing 0` to the start command in start.bat.
2. Resolve the missing material error by correcting or replacing the `.wmt` file for the 'sprites/bubble' material located in the hl2 directory.
3. Ensure consistent `maxplayers` settings by specifying a single value (e.g., +maxplayers 21) in both server.cfg and start.bat to avoid conflicting log messages.

problem: The user wants to write a Russian server name in a batch file (batnik) for Counter-Strike: Source, but encounters garbled characters and issues with UTF-8 encoding. The question is whether it's possible to correctly display the Russian server name directly in the batch file.
solution: It is not feasible to set the server name directly in a batch file due to encoding limitations. Instead, configure the server name through `server.cfg` or use `valve.rc`. For batch files that require text output, ensure the text editor saves the file in ANSI encoding (or convert existing UTF-8 text without BOM to ANSI). Alternatively, Notepad++ can be used to write Russian text and then convert it to ANSI via 'Encoding -> Convert to ANSI'.
title: Можно ли прописать в батнике по русски название сервера?

problem: After updating CSS to version v72, the MOTD (Message of the Day) on a server started causing some players to be kicked immediately after joining. solution: Remove the iframe from the MOTD file or replace it with a simple redirect meta tag. One effective solution suggested was using `<meta http-equiv="REFRESH" content="0;URL=your_website_url">` within the HTML head of the MOTD, which avoids the iframe issue and displays the website without causing kicks.

problem: The user wants to know how to disable plugins through the `plugin_settings.cfg` file in SourceMod, specifically to prevent certain plugins from running on a server where they will never be used. The goal is to manage plugin configurations without splitting the SourceMod directory into subfolders using `sm_basepatch`, as the same folder is shared across two servers.
solution:
To disable a plugin via `plugin_settings.cfg`, you can add a line that sets the plugin's enable flag to false. For example, if the plugin is named `example_plugin`, you would include the following line in `plugin_settings.cfg`:

```
set sm_example_plugin_enable 0
```
Replace `sm_example_plugin_enable` with the appropriate variable name for your plugin (usually prefixed with `sm_`). This configuration will prevent the specified plugin from loading on the server. Ensure that the file is placed in the correct SourceMod configurations directory (`sourcemod/configs`) and that the server is restarted or the configuration reloaded to apply the changes.
title: Файл plugin_settings.cfg

Adjust network settings as follows: sv_minrate to 10000, sv_maxrate to 20000, sv_minupdaterate and sv_maxupdaterate to 67, sv_mincmdrate and sv_maxcmdrate to 67, sv_client_cmdrate_difference to 1, sv_client_min_interp_ratio to -1, sv_client_max_interp_ratio to -1. Additionally, ensure that the server bandwidth is sufficient (e.g., sv_minrate 30000, sv_maxrate 100000 for a 1GB channel).

problem: The user has a Fast 2804 router (v5) and cannot access the server using its external IP address. The router is not visible in the global search, and only the local address provided by the router can be accessed. The user seeks assistance to resolve this issue and make the server reachable via the external IP address for Counter-Strike: Source v34.
solution: The solution involves ensuring that port forwarding (specifically ports 27005-27015 for CS:S) is correctly configured on the Fast 2804 router to forward traffic from the external IP address to the local IP address of the server. Additionally, verify that the router's DHCP settings are not conflicting with the server's IP allocation and that the router firmware is up-to-date. If the router model does not support direct access via its management interface for global search, consider using a different router or configuring static NAT entries manually to expose the server's internal IP address externally.
title: Настройка Роутера для сервера Counter-Strike Source v34

problem: The user is unable to start a Counter-Strike: Source (CS:S) server on a Linux VPS running CentOS. The installation process using `hldsupdatetool.bin` fails with an 'Input/output error' and later with insufficient library errors. After installing required libraries, the server launch command (`./srcds_run` or similar) results in 'No such file or directory' errors.
solution: Ensure that the correct binary is used (`srcds_linux` or `srcds_run`) and has execute permissions. Install missing 32-bit libraries on CentOS (e.g., `yum install lib32gcc1 glibc.i686 ia32-libs`). Verify the path to the server files and use the appropriate launch command with necessary parameters such as `-console`, `-game cstrike` or `-game tf` for Team Fortress 2, `+map`, `+maxplayers`, `+port`, and `+ip`. Run the server in daemon mode to keep it running after disconnecting from SSH.
title: Server CS:S на VPS сервере Linux. Не могу запустить.

problem: The server crashes when changing maps.
solution: Ensure that the map being loaded is compatible with the server configuration and SourceMod plugins. Check for any plugin conflicts or missing resources related to the new map. Verify that the `changelevel` command in the startup script correctly references the map file (e.g., `+map de_dust2`). Additionally, review the server logs for specific error messages around the time of map change to identify and address underlying issues.
title: [проблема] При смене карты сервак "ломается".

problem: The CS:S server is crashing frequently due to various reasons such as player actions (e.g., being shot, banning a player) and warnings related to out-of-range values in the 'm_vecBaseVelocity' SendPropFloat. Additionally, there is an unresolved issue with the Thc_Rpg mod where one perk cannot be removed.
solution: Recompile the server from scratch as it previously helped resolve similar glitches. Ensure all plugins are correctly configured and consider checking for any recent changes or conflicts introduced by the Thc_Rpg mod.
title: Нужно почистить сервер CSS v70

problem: A player received a ban on the server and after that the server started crashing, warning about it. The server is hosted with Metamod, Sourcemod, and DoS Protect installed. The question is how to protect the server from such attacks.
solution: Install ServerSecure (Files only) - Server protection against the Upload / Download exploit and Query Cache 1.7 as suggested by Seryy™. Additionally, ensure that SourceMod is updated to version 1.4.2 to fix a bug in Sourcemod related to the exploit.
title: Ломают сервер CSS v70 Linux

problem: The update to CS:S version v70 caused compatibility issues, particularly with the no-steam patch and certain SourceMod plugins like 'CSS Bank MySQL Support' (v1.4.4) and 'Quake Sounds' (2.7). Users reported that these plugins stopped working after the update, and there were difficulties in loading Steam support libraries on Linux servers.
solution: The solution involves using an emulator or a patched version of the server to maintain compatibility with the no-steam patch. Additionally, updating SourceMod and related plugins to versions compatible with v70, such as SourceMod 1.4.1 and RevCrew_win_9.85_02022012 for Windows servers, resolves the plugin incompatibility issues. For Linux servers experiencing Steam library loading failures, switching to an emulator or ensuring correct configuration of Steam libraries is recommended.
title: CSS обновление v70

problem: When the first map change occurs on a SourceMod-enabled server, the quake sound and admin sound are disabled.
solution: The issue was caused by an incorrect value for sv_pure. Adjusting this setting resolved the problem.
title: Косяк

problem: How to use a console command to restart the SourceMod server?
solution: The appropriate console command for restarting the SourceMod server is not explicitly stated in the provided posts, but it suggests checking the forum at https://hlmod.net/forums/obschie-voprosy.14/ for detailed instructions.
title: Перезагрузка сервера
